name: Grassland
description:
Must be constructed on a Grassland Post.
Spawns a Horse up to the max of 5 every 90/60/45 seconds in Feudal/Castle/Imperial Ages. Each Horse in a Grassland grants +2 maximum Health to all Melee Cavalry and +1 to all Ranged Cavalry.
Horses can be used by War Stables in Influence to instantly train Cavalry at a 25 resources discount.
influences: Use a Horse from a Grassland to instantly train Cavalry with a 25 resource discount.
